title: versioning — authorization policies
description: Two policies. Both enforce is_system=true refusal for non-super_admin edits (via foundation's HasSystemFlag). Lifecycle actions (release / deprecate / sunset) are further gated to super_admin because they affect the platform.

abilities.scope: any authenticated user — catalog is public information
platform admins see draft + sunset rows too
super_admin only — metadata edits (name / description / migration_guide_url). State transitions use dedicated abilities.
super_admin only, refused when state ≠ draft OR any subscription references
super_admin only. Deprecated → sunset. Refused when sunset_at > now() without --force flag.
published notices only for regular users; drafts visible to platform admins
platform_admin: super_admin OR ops OR product
draft rows editable by author + super_admin; published rows refused unless super_admin (published notices are append-only via HasVersions revisions)
draft → published. super_admin only — publishing dispatches customer notifications.
